<!-- Adding a shortcut? Fill this in. CI will scan it and post a safety score automatically. -->

## New shortcut

- **Name:**
- **Category:** <!-- Productivity / Utilities / Media / Health / Home / Developer / Fun -->
- **Runs on:** <!-- ios / ipados / macos / watchos -->
- **iCloud share link:** <!-- https://www.icloud.com/shortcuts/... (this becomes the one-tap Install button) -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Added `shortcuts/<slug>/shortcut.plist` (the actions; unsigned XML/binary plist)
- [ ] Added `shortcuts/<slug>/meta.yml` (name, slug, author, category, source, description, platforms, tags)
- [ ] Ran `python -m scripts.vet_pr` locally and pasted the score below
- [ ] Read the auto-generated `prompt.md` — it accurately describes what the shortcut does
- [ ] I confirm the `source` is a real iCloud link I control (no bait-and-switch)

## Safety score

<!-- paste the line from `python -m scripts.vet_pr`, e.g.  green  100  my-shortcut -->

```
```

> 🔴 Red shortcuts (shell/SSH/JS execution, off-device exfiltration) are blocked from
> auto-merge and need a maintainer override with a documented reason.
